heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear, then some clouds late from the Adirondacks and Rt. 2 north. Lows in the upper 20s to mid 30s. Winds southwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph this evening, decreasing overnight.

heading: Monday
text: Partly sunny from the Adirondacks and Rt. 4 north, and mostly sunny south. Quite mild. Highs in the 50s to near 60 north, 60 to 65 south. Winds southwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 to 30 mph.

heading: Monday Night
text: Mostly clear and mild. Lows in the 30s. Winds southwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph in the evening, diminishing to less than 10 mph late.

heading: Tuesday
text: Sun, mixing with some clouds through northern NY and Quebec later in the day. Highs in the 50s to near 60 north, 60 to 65 south. Winds light, becoming southwest, increasing to 10 to 15 mph.
